about.metaDescription: Doğukan Özgan — an independent insurance agency based in Şişli/İstanbul. With multi-company agency, compares the most suitable offer in every branch.
about.heading: Your trusted advisor in insurance, right by your side
about.intro: Doğukan Özgan is an independent insurance advisory focused directly on the client's needs rather than on a single insurance company.
about.p1: We serve a broad range — from traffic and motor to health, from private pension to home and life insurance. By comparing offers from dozens of insurance companies one by one, we find the policy that best fits your budget and expectations.
about.p2: Our goal is not just to sell a policy; it is to explain the right coverage in plain language and to be there for you when a claim happens. We follow the process end to end and handle communication with the relevant insurer on your behalf.
about.p3: From our office in Mecidiyeköy / Şişli we also serve all of Türkiye remotely. For a question, a quote, or a second opinion on your existing policy — support is always just a phone call or WhatsApp message away.
about.v1Body: We are not tied to a single company. We compare 20+ insurers and recommend the one that suits you best.
about.v2Body: We explain coverages and exclusions in plain language; no surprise clauses.
about.v3Body: As soon as your request comes in, we get back to you by phone or WhatsApp.
about.v4Title: By your side at claim time
about.v4Body: We don't sell a policy and forget it; we follow the claim process end to end on your behalf.
about.story1: For years we've worked in insurance with an advisory approach that stands by the client. Over that time it became clear that what people really need isn't a policy; it's an advisor who asks the right questions, explains coverage plainly and stands behind it when needed.
about.story2: That is why, instead of staying tied to a single company, we chose to be an independent agency. This puts your interest at the centre and lets us compare market options impartially.
about.approachBody: Listening comes first: we don't offer a quote before understanding your needs, budget and priorities. We then compare the options in plain language and leave the decision to you. After the sale, we stay by your side throughout the process.
about.branchesBody: From your car to your health, your home to your future — we're by your side for all your essential insurance needs.
about.companiesBody: We work with Türkiye's leading insurers and compare prices impartially for you.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Doğukan Özgan insurance agency: phone, WhatsApp, email and the office address in Mecidiyeköy / Şişli, İstanbul. Leave a callback request.
contact.heading: Get in touch and let's talk about your best offer
contact.intro: You can reach us by phone, WhatsApp or email, or leave a callback request below. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.formIntro: Leave your details and we'll call you as soon as possible.
contact.formWhatsappHint: If you'd rather chat right away, you can also send the form via WhatsApp.
contact.formNote: Your details are used only to get back to you, processed in line with KVKK.
contact.kvkkConsent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of getting back to me.
contact.successBody: Your callback request has reached us. We'll get in touch with you as soon as possible.

faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions and answers about insurance quotes, the companies we work with, data security, payment and cancellation, plus traffic, kasko, health, private pension (BES), life, home, DASK, travel and corporate insurance.

faqPage.intro: We've grouped the questions under a General heading and by insurance type. If you can't find what you're looking for, you can always reach us by phone or WhatsApp.
faqPage.ctaTitle: Didn't find the answer to your question?
faqPage.ctaBody: Reach out to us directly and we'll help with your specific needs.

bes.intro: Estimate your savings including the state contribution based on your monthly payment and term.
bes.realHint: In today's money after {years} years, assuming {inflation}% inflation.

saglik.title: Health Insurance Premium Estimate
saglik.intro: See an approximate monthly/annual premium range based on your age and coverage.

hayat.title: Life Insurance Calculator
hayat.intro: Two separate benefits: death cover for your loved ones, or tax-advantaged savings.
hayat.vefatLead: Death cover is the financial security you leave your loved ones in an unexpected moment. The figures below are approximate; get a quote for the exact cover and premium.
hayat.birikimLead: Savings-based life insurance provides both protection and investment; your premiums build up savings over the long term while you also benefit from a tax advantage. It is planned over a medium-to-long term of 5–12 years.
hayat.goldTitle: Value protection via gold / FX indexing
hayat.goldBody: By placing your savings in gold- or FX-indexed products, you can aim to protect your money's purchasing power against inflation over the long term. We determine the suitable product and rates together.
hayat.vergiNotice: The tax-advantage estimate relies on a simplified assumption; actual income-tax deduction rates and caps vary by legislation and your situation. Consult your accountant / the quote process for the exact amount.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for may have moved, been renamed, or never existed. Use the options below to continue where you left off.
